name: Equity Outcomes Analysis
description: Achievement gap analysis by demographic groups with FERPA protection (min 5 students)

cards.title: Achievement Outcomes by Demographic
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                race_ethnicity as "Race/Ethnicity",
                                english_learner as "English Learner",
                                special_education as "Special Education",
                                economically_disadvantaged as "Economically Disadvantaged",
                                cohort_size as "Student Count",
                                ROUND(avg_gpa, 2) as "Avg GPA",
                                ROUND(pct_good_attendance, 1) as "Good Attendance %",
                                ROUND(pct_no_discipline, 1) as "No Discipline %"
                            FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics
                            WHERE cohort_size >= 5
                            ORDER BY avg_gpa DESC

cards.title: Performance Gap Index
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                race_ethnicity as category,
                                ROUND(MAX(avg_gpa) - MIN(avg_gpa), 2) as disparity_index
                            FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics
                            WHERE cohort_size >= 5
                            GROUP BY race_ethnicity
                            ORDER BY disparity_index DESC

cards.title: % GPA 2.5+ by Race/Ethnicity
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                race_ethnicity as "Group",
                                ROUND(AVG(pct_gpa_2_5_plus), 1) as "GPA 2.5+ %"
                            FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics
                            WHERE cohort_size >= 5
                            GROUP BY race_ethnicity
                            ORDER BY "GPA 2.5+ %" DESC

cards.title: Academic Risk by Demographic
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                race_ethnicity as "Demographic",
                                COUNT(*) as "Groups",
                                ROUND(AVG(cohort_size), 1) as "Avg Cohort Size",
                                ROUND(AVG(pct_below_c), 1) as "Avg Below C %"
                            FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics
                            WHERE cohort_size >= 5
                            GROUP BY race_ethnicity
                            ORDER BY "Avg Below C %" DESC
